mapper.insert: insert into ai_c_recharge_package (package_name, package_code, power_num, bonus_power_num, sale_price, original_price, sort, package_desc, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{packageName}, #{packageCode}, #{powerNum}, #{bonusPowerNum}, #{salePrice}, #{originalPrice}, #{sort}, #{packageDesc}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update ai_c_recharge_package set package_name = #{packageName}, package_code = #{packageCode}, power_num = #{powerNum}, bonus_power_num = #{bonusPowerNum}, sale_price = #{salePrice}, original_price = #{originalPrice}, sort = #{sort}, package_desc = #{packageDesc}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where package_id = #{packageId}
